changeSet.author: hephaestus

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN is_nullable = 'YES' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'chat_message' AND column_name = 'parts'

changeSet.comment: Backstop any NULL parts (defensive — backfill should have caught all) and enforce NOT NULL
changeSet.sql: UPDATE chat_message SET parts = '[]'::jsonb WHERE parts IS NULL; ALTER TABLE chat_message ALTER COLUMN parts SET NOT NULL;

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE chat_message ALTER COLUMN parts DROP NOT NULL;

changeSet.author: hephaestus

not.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'chk_chat_message_parts_shape' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

changeSet.comment: Constrain chat_message.parts to JSON array shape (symmetric to metadata constraint)

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE chat_message DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_chat_message_parts_shape;
